action: ADR-0046 Layer 1: replace prose-scraping with declarative floor commitment. Triage DECLARES committed coverage floors structurally in the triage artifact's JSON companion (e.g. {"floors":["clihealth","ledger"]}; companion already exists — postship.go:91). The R9.2 capacity clamp (internal/triagecap) counts DECLARATIONS exactly instead of regex token-matching over bullets; the existing heuristic counter (CountCommittedFloors, fixed in 0f0b1ff9) demotes from judge to cross-examiner — prose-vs-declaration divergence yields a correction the agent can ALWAYS satisfy (fix your declaration), ending the unconvergeable-correction class that killed cycles 301/302. The throughput window (window.go Record) switches to declared+shipped floors, ending self-referential calibration (the K=4 poisoning). DeferredFloorPackages and the R9.3 evalgate floor-binding consume per-section declarations, retiring the remaining prose scrapes. Update agents/evolve-triage.md + triage profile self-check accordingly; expose `evolve guard triage-floors <artifact>` so the agent can verify its own declaration (ADR-0045 self-check pattern). TDD pins: cycle-301 verbatim artifacts with declarations count exactly the declared set; divergence (prose mentions gc, floors omits it) produces a satisfiable correction, not a reject; window records declared floors only.
